dealSummary: Netomi, the developer of an AI customer service platform, secured a $110 million round led by Accenture Ventures.
Iterative Health, a healthtech startup focused on clinical research, raised a $77 million Series C led by Intrepid Growth Partners and GV.
Scientific machine learning startup JuliaHub secured a $65 million Series B led by Dorilton Capital.
German energy storage company CMBlu Energy received €50 million in a Series C from investors including Samsung Ventures at a €1 billion valuation.
leadInvestors: Samsung Ventures at a €1 billion valuation

dealSummary: Stockholm-based legal AI startup Legora raised a $50 million Series D extension from investors including Atlassian, Airtree and NVentures at a $5.6 billion valuation, bringing the round's total to $600 million.
Versana, an enterprise data specialist serving the private credit market, received a $43 million round led by BNP Paribas.
Moleculent, a Swedish life sciences startup developing cell-mapping technology, received a $20 million Series A led by Rubicon Healthcare Partners.
AI inference company Featherless secured a $20 million Series A led by AMD Ventures and Airbus Ventures.
Squads, a financial infrastructure startup, raised an $18 million round led by Solana Ventures.
Dutch quantum computing specialist Groove Quantum secured a €16 million seed round led by Innovation Industries and 55 North.

company: Photon, provider of a prescription platform for healthcare systems
dealSummary: Photon, provider of a prescription platform for healthcare systems, raised a $16 million Series A led by Healthier Capital.
